MELSubItem.Title: Automatic External Defibrillator (AED) and/or Associated Equipment

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be incomplete, inoperative, or removed provided:

ListItem.Para: AED is labeled or placarded in a manner that will identify it as a unit that cannot be mistaken for a fully serviceable unit.
Location placarding is removed or obscured.
Repairs or replacements are made within one flight.

Note.Para: Medical equipment installed in the aircraft as part of an Emergency Medical Service (EMS) operation is not considered part of the normal complement of equipment.

OperationProcedure.Para: Any placard associated with the inoperative or removed equipment is to be obscured from view by placarding "INOPERATIVE" or "INOP".

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative, damaged, or missing provided proper installation and operation is verified at each preflight.

OperationProcedure.Para: Verify the associated AEDs are properly installed and operate correctly before each flight.

MELSubItem.Title: Emergency Medical Kit (EMK) and/or Associated Equipment

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be incomplete or removed provided:

ListItem.Para: EMK is labeled or placarded in a manner that will identify it as a unit that cannot be mistaken for a fully serviceable unit.
Location placarding is removed or obscured.
Repairs or replacements are made within two consecutive calendar days

Note.Para: Medical equipment installed in the aircraft as part of an Emergency Medical Service (EMS) operation is not considered part of the normal complement of equipment.

OperationProcedure.Para: The incomplete kit must be sealed and clearly labeled (or placarded) to identify the missing or inoperative components, as appropriate.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative, damaged, or missing provided proper installation and operation is verified at each preflight.

OperationProcedure.Para: Verify the associated EMKs are properly installed and operate correctly before each flight.

MELSubItem.Title: First Aid Kit (FAK) and/or Associated Equipment

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Number required: 3 - Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
Number required: 4 - Applicable to: VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A869, VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879.
If more than one is required by VAR, only one of the required FAKs may be incomplete or removed provided:

ListItem.Para: The FAK is labeled or placarded in a manner that will identify it as a unit that cannot be mistaken for a fully serviceable unit.
Location placarding is removed or obscured.
Repairs or replacements are made within one flight.

Note.Para: Medical equipment installed in the aircraft as part of an Emergency Medical Service (EMS) operation is not considered part of the normal complement of equipment.

OperationProcedure.Para: The incomplete kit must be sealed and clearly labeled (or placarded) to identify the missing or inoperative components, as appropriate.

DispatchCondition.Title: Any In Excess Of Those Required By VAR

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.
Any in excess of those required by VAR may be incomplete, or removed.

OperationProcedure.Para: The incomplete kit must be sealed and clearly labeled (or placarded) to identify the missing or inoperative components, as appropriate.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: May be inoperative, damaged, or missing provided proper installation and operation is verified at each preflight.

OperationProcedure.Para: Verify the associated FAKs are properly installed and operate correctly before each flight.
